message:
feat(core): SIMD-accelerated conformal prediction anomaly detector (ft-344j8.8)

Upgrade semantic_anomaly.rs with mathematically rigorous conformal
prediction for formal false discovery rate guarantees. Adds SIMD-friendly
4-wide chunked vector math, SortedCalibrationBuffer with O(log N) rank
queries, and ConformalAnomalyDetector that computes empirical p-values.
Preserves backwards compatibility with existing SemanticAnomalyDetector.
44 unit tests + 30 proptest properties all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
